decisions: Use file-based memory (memory.json) for assistant state
Phase 1 approach: wrap existing bonar-cms without breaking changes
Beddel tool primitives will call existing API endpoints
casasavana app is the reference tenant template
findings: SDK uses Clean Architecture: core/interfaces → infrastructure → presentation
Auth: AppCheck (reads) + Firebase ID Token (writes) + smart guard for public tables
SSG export to sites/{domain}/ → Firebase Hosting per tenant
2 tenants exist: Casa Savana (4nk7GC3p6MoM7gK8CUrR), Ensaio Rua (eXNaziY5M0uTTebgWiG5)
PublicDataCacheService caches public tables (agenda, metadata) to Firebase Storage JSON
Email dispatch via Postmark (setItem with events=EMAIL)
Users belong to tenants via apps[] array
open_questions: API: keep Next.js routes or migrate to FastAPI?
Tenant apps: separate Next.js apps or single app with dynamic routing?
Hosting: Firebase vs Cloudflare Pages vs Vercel?
Billing: flat fee, usage-based, or hybrid?
Migration: how to handle existing Casa Savana data?
